case_title: TONY J LOPEZ VS. SHAILENDRA DEVHARA, ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SHAILENDRA DEVHARA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-01-2014 AT 3:30 PM. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, TONY J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER CARTER, IRENE $4,842.81 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,992.81, ; AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SHAILENDRA DEVHARA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED NOV-14-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEVHARA, SHAILENDRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. 1 DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAILENDRA DEVHARA DOES NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT IRENE BUTLER CARTER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, TONY J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER CARTER, IRENE $3,793.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,943.00, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SHAILENDARA DEVHARA WAS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ON 12/1/14. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTLER CARTER, IRENE HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,842.31 FILED BY LOPEZ, TONY J AS TO DEFENDANT DEVHARA, SHAILENDRA BUTLER CARTER, IRENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
